  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64Bit or Windows 11 64Bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-6600K or AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: AMD Radeon RX 6500 XT or NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: The minimum PC components are based on estimated performance targets. The game has not been tested on low-end systems, and it may not run properly or may fail to start on some configurations. Performance is not guaranteed and will vary depending on your specific hardware and system setup.
